name: Sweet Corn & Tomato Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt butter over medium heat.
2. Add corn, onion, and green pepper to the saucepan with melted butter.
3. Stir in brown sugar and salt.
4. Cover the pan and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Stir in the diced tomato and continue simmering for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Serve hot.
Yield: 4 servings.
